name: Wanda Sykes
description: American comedian, writer, actress and voice artist
abstract: Wanda Yvette Sykes (born March 7, 1964) is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and writer. She was first recognized for her work as a writer on The Chris Rock Show, for which she won a Primetime Emmy Award in 1999.

concerts.label: Toyota Comedy Festival: Dave Chappelle
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] You have to watch the comedienne, Wanda Sykes, on that matter. [INTERVIEWEE] No, she’s not one of my favorites.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Heath — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
